name: ChatGPT question-to-draft product kit
visualThesis: One persistent ChatGPT shell carries a typed request through a real assistant response, a source inspection, and a Canvas rewrite before resolving to the exact knot.
sourceEvidence: Every product surface is native DOM, CSS, and inline SVG. The composition reuses the recovered story and local exact-knot asset but renders no screenshot plane or network media.

components.purpose: The persistent ChatGPT application shell shared by the home, conversation, sources, Canvas, and updated states.

states.description: The typed prompt is ready in the ChatGPT composer.
The submitted user bubble and streaming assistant response share one conversation.
The response remains readable while its source drawer is open.
The same payload becomes an editable Canvas document.

parts.purpose: Visible cause that submits the prompt.
Preserves the exact typed payload inside the conversation.
Streams one coherent ChatGPT answer in reading order.
Turns the source-backed answer into an editable draft.
Shows the revised working document at rest.

interactions.cause: The send control and pointer compress together.
interactions.result: The prompt becomes a user bubble and ChatGPT streams an answer.
The source drawer opens beside the persistent answer.
The answer becomes a split chat-and-document Canvas workspace.
